problem id: 2e0f64b7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00111010 -> 10001111
  11011101 -> 11011111
  10100000 -> 10111110
  00010100 -> 11010111
  00100000 -> 10111111
  01000011 -> 11111001
  10101101 -> 00110101
  11110100 -> 00011110

query: 10001111
predicted answer: 01110001
